topics.reason: Students struggle with the complexities of network latency, fault tolerance, and data synchronization across multiple independent nodes.
Understanding loose coupling, service orchestration, and enterprise service buses is highly abstract without real-world enterprise experience.
Mapping presentation, business logic, and data layers correctly without creating tight dependencies is conceptually challenging.
